sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59981" key="krikhlasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῐκ-ηλᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κρίκος, ἐλαύνω</etym>) <sense id="n59981.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trundling of hoops</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:26:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.26.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
